{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20998_1
|class_id=20998
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20998_2
|fame=29
|art=16
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=16
|ss1=All ELMT DMG +2<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +1<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss2=All ELMT DMG +4<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +2<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss3=All ELMT DMG +6<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +3<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss4=All ELMT DMG +6<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +3<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss7=All ELMT DMG +6<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +3<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
